title: LettuceK Meeting Room Panorama
description: Changes the menu panorama to a view of LettuceK's meeting room from the Unstable SMP
body:
On the Unstable SMP, LettuceK's meeting room is seen a few times when he is talking to his commanders. This resource pack turns the menu panorama into this meeting room.

I used the map from [this video](https://youtu.be/npMWxjbSiDA) to make this panorama and I used [Panorama Screenshot](https://modrinth.com/project/K3RHGadZ) to take the screenshots and format them easily.

This resource pack is also included in my modpack, [Unstable SMP Recreation](https://modrinth.com/project/SU0WjsoL).
